This package contains functions relating to processing strings.

subprograms.name: char
subprograms.code: procedure char(e : out element_type; s : cons_index)

documentation.description: Parse a string as an integer and return the integer value.

subprograms.name: length
subprograms.code: procedure length(e : out element_type; s : cons_index)

documentation.description: Return a specified character from a string.

subprograms.name: parse_integer
subprograms.code: procedure parse_integer(e : out element_type; s : cons_index)

documentation.description: Return a substring of the original string

subprograms.name: string_downcase
subprograms.code: procedure string_downcase(e : out element_type; s : cons_index)

documentation.description:
Helper functions for length of a list (note that length of a string is in
  BBS.lisp.strings).

subprograms.name: string_upcase
subprograms.code: procedure string_upcase(e : out element_type; s : cons_index)

documentation.description: Convert a string to lower case

subprograms.name: subseq
subprograms.code: procedure subseq(e : out element_type; s : cons_index)

documentation.description: Convert a string to upper case
